judgment.summary: QQQ is an ETF tracking the Nasdaq-100, not a single company, and therefore fundamental metrics are not applicable.
negatives: QQQ is an ETF, not an individual company, so traditional fundamental metrics like P/E, growth, and margins do not apply.
